review_title: It's a really good system but it's not easy to use.
author: Alejandra S.
pros: - It's a data history buffer. - Facilitate interdepartmental communication, because the data it's in one place. - You can use it in multiple ways, from RRHH to Logistics. - Better control in the areas. - You can control your process, even productive problems. - Every user has a responsability, if something go wrong you can know who did it. - The system has access control, not everyone can modify the data or configuration. - The system is separated by modules. For example: Production Planning (PP), Material Managment (MM). - You have a great variety of transaction that you can use in multiples ways. - You can share and modify your data easily. (Just in PP or MM not master data) - You can customize reports according your requirements. - Align Processes.
cons: -It's not a easy to use tool, if you don't have a trainning could be hard. - The price is a little high to a standar model. - The support it's a little hard to find and you have to practice a lot if you want to maximize the use. - Not all companies work with a standard model. - The master data management have to be concentrated in only one person, if not you can have some troubles. - The profiles permissions can be a hard work.

description: Overall, SAP NetWeaver provided a reliable and robust platform for integration and business process management, though it required significant technical expertise and resources to manage effectively.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Strong integration with SAP and non-SAP systems Supports ABAP, Java, and web services Centralized system and user management Efficient business process automation Scalable and reliable enterprise platform
cons: Complex setup and configuration Steep learning curve for new users High infrastructure and maintenance costs Performance issues with large data volumes. Limited flexibility compared to modern cloud platforms.

review_title: A good tool, flexible and powerful
description: A very stable system, in most cases comes out of the box but with a lot of customizing options, lot of functionalities are already approved by audit companies
author: Lorenzo P.
pros: high level of customizing and great user interface makes the experience for the final user easy and smooth
cons: there is a lot of online assistance give by sap forum where worldwide users and developers contribute to the community

review_title: Benefits of getting through set up
description: Still learning the set up. Once we got the terminology figured out we were able to get through the multiple pages of set up. We had to google search multiple of the steps to be able to complete.
author: Allison L.
pros: Gets you out there in a large community the services you offer to a more global market. Once you are established it will be a advantage for growing a smaller business for growth
cons: It was a lot of navigating to understand what is needed to get set up but the value was going to outweigh the frustration
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The Lifeblood of Enterprise Integration - SAP NetWeaver
description: Although I don't directly utilize this software on the regular, I see the fruits of its integration from the many tools I do use frequently. Just as sap circulates through a tree to sustain every branch, SAP NetWeaver connects the core SAP system with the applications that keep enterprises alive. For instance, our ticketing systems are all integrated within SAP to generate, assign and track priority tasks. Our PLM integrates seamlessly by providing a streamlined path for any updates to existing and new additions. Allowing for data to be transferred, obtained, and reviewed with ease and accuracy.
author: Jeremy J.
pros: The versatility of this software is where it shines in my opinion. From itemization to organization, it allows us to keep clear records of sourcing, ticketing, stocking and aids in generating supply analytics and logistics.
cons: For those who are high-capacity users it may be different, but for me I always find that I need a refresher course to navigate as I may only need to access a couple times a month for specific tasks.

description: SAP NetWeaver excels in integrating various applications and systems, which helps streamline business processes and improve efficiency.
author: Bien C.
pros: One of the most valuable aspects of SAP NetWeaver is its ability to integrate various applications and systems seamlessly. This integration helps businesses streamline processes and improve efficiency
cons: The platform can be quite complex, requiring significant expertise to manage and configure effectively. This can be a barrier for smaller businesses or teams with limited technical resources.

description: SAP has been exceptionally good and quite easy to use.
author: Aneury H.
pros: The flexibility of search and/or looking for parts
cons: The overall fell and understanding of the home page

description: I think although their UI should be better, it is incredibly staple, reliable and secure. I had to use tis customer support once and everything was great.
author: abdiel P.
pros: Love its stability and integration capabilities with SAP, CRM, HR, etc. I dont remember it failing or having any bugs or issues. I just think its super strong and industry staple. Must have.
cons: I think the learning curve is a bit hard. Explaining this to someone takes time and care. I dont think its easy to use, but its code management is unmatched.

review_title: A SOLID FOUNDATION FOR enterprise integration
description: SAP NetWeaver offers a powerful, enterprise-grade platform with excellent integration and stability, but is increasingly seen as a legacy solution in a world moving toward cloud-native technologies like SAP S/4HANA and SAP BTP. It's great for traditional SAP landscapes but less suited for organizations looking for agility and rapid innovation.
author: Lubais T.
pros: SAP NetWeaver is well-liked for its integration power, development flexibility, and enterprise-grade reliability.
cons: While SAP NetWeaver is robust, it’s often criticized for being complex, outdated, and expensive to maintain, particularly as businesses move toward modern, cloud-native platforms.

review_title: SAP NetWeaver - The Best In Class
description: It was highly effective and adaptable, offering an excellent platform for developing custom enterprise applications using ABAP and Java stacks, as well as managing business processes. When properly configured and maintained, it served as the engine room for the entire SAP landscape.
author: Shantanu S.
pros: The integration capability of SAP NetWeaver is its strongest feature. It acted as a comprehensive platform that unified various SAP applications and systems, simplifying the construction and execution of complex, end-to-end business processes.
cons: I have used this platform, and I honestly haven't found anything I dislike so far. So, nothing as such.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SAP NetWeaver: Powerful integration with a steep learning curve
description: using SAP NetWeaver can be both powerful and challenging. Its strength lies in its ability to integrate diverse business processes and systems seamlessly, making it a cornerstone for enterprise-wide IT environments. On the other hand, it requires a significant investment in time and resources to master it.
author: Aleidy R.
pros: SAP has a robust integration capabilities, allowing seamless connectivity between SAP and non-SAP apps. Its flexibility in supporting various business processes across different environments is a major plus.
cons: maybe its complexity, particularly during the initial setup and configuration phases. The learning curve can be steep, especially for those without prior SAP experience, which can lead to extended implementation times and increased costs.

description: SAP NetWeaver 7.4 is optimized for SAP HANA. It enables the use of SAP HANA as the underlying database and facilitates the optimization of applications for SAP HANA. It also includes new and changed features for the Application Server ABAP, connectivity, UI technologies, SAP Business Warehouse and security. SAP HANA is more than just a technical platform that speeds analytics it is an innovation platform for business transformation, delivering actionable information in real time to drive smart, agile decision making and strategizing. With SAP NetWeaver 7.4, which is fully optimized for SAP HANA
author: Javid Q.
pros: SAP NW is more than just application, collaborations , secure and fast with ABAP & JAVA stacks.
cons: Kernel need to upgrade from 720.

author: Nikos D.
pros: It integrates all company's system into one environment. Easy to use and a great variety of choices and reports. Also, you can run 2 or more windows of the same user account simultaneously.
cons: Not very often it needs more time to download a great amount of data. But that is rare.

description: SAP NetWeaver is powerful but you must have the experience to be able to reap the benefits.
author: Janet L.
pros: SAP NetWeaver is a powerful ERP provided you set it up properly, there is a lot of functionality available.
cons: SAP NetWeaver is not very user friendly so you have to search for function codes to be able to generate what you require.

author: Jaime D.
pros: Very easy to use for raising shopping carts and purchase order creation - once you know the codes your company uses it's a breeze
cons: There really aren't any cons with this product once you have the required codes the system basically does everything for you

author: Vito K.
pros: Easy to use and great frontend tool for SAP. Great for visualization of SAP data and browser functionality. Fully integrated into SAP.
cons: A little bit on the expensive side. You need some time to get used to the configuration and programming.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Working with hundreds of projects, the work list grid only allows me to view 3 at a time and searching for specific projects is not available through any filters or sorting capabilities.
author: Carol C.
lucrezia P.
pros: ottimo per gestire le oda e le conferme d'ordine
cons: la grafica non è molto curata ed alcuni tasti non si capisce subito che funzionalità abbiano
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: What is especially convenient about SAP NetWeaver as it related to our company's spare parts management is that not only can I view spare parts information for one site, but for all sites. This is most helpful when I need a spare part that is not in stock on site but is in stock at another site. Prior to using SAP NetWeaver that is not a luxury I would have had.
author: Nathaniel H.
pros: SAP NetWeaver is the technology platform that my company uses as a link between our spare parts management system and SAP, among other uses. Using SAP NetWeaver, I can find all spare parts both in stock and out of stock, quantities, locations, and more within SAP.
cons: At first, SAP NetWeaver takes a learning curve to get used to. It is not structured similarly to other software's I am used to using, but once you get the hang of it then it is quite simple to use.

description: Overall great system just needed to be able to run multiple reports.
author: Driale W.
pros: The program hardly glitched. It was easy to use and had clear instructions!
cons: When running reports it could be challenging if you did not know what you were looking for. I also didn’t like that you could not run multiple within the same report you had to do one then another.

description: My overall experience with SAP Netweaver is a great experience.
author: Kourtney K.
pros: What i like most about SAP Netweaver is the way the application is set up and the efficiency of the program.
cons: I have not had a bad experience with SAP Netweaver.

review_title: Helps effectively link different organizational silos
author: Alejandro R.
pros: I have noticed that Wily applies SAP strong application server features, which enable them to facilitate different business departments. It has allowed us to consolidate data so that any given application that is used will be current with other applications in real time.
cons: The only functional concern for Informatics is concerning to the compatibility of the system with various other applications or platforms. There are still configurable external applications which sometimes may cause delays in the setup and synchronization of the data.

review_title: Centralized management enhances our operational control
author: Gerd E.
pros: SAP NetWeaver made it easy to track and monitor different business processes through its centralized management. Solutions such as the SAP NetWeaver Administrator gave live updates of the system’s status, which could guide addressing of potential issues before they arose.​
cons: There was some inconvenience in using the Master Data Management element, especially in terms of data integrity across various modules.

review_title: Powerful product, but needs proper control and change management processes.
description: Fairly easy to use. Management needs to commit to upkeep and maintenance ongoing as business processes and changes to HR/people occur.
author: Lance C.
pros: Integration of people, systems and business processes. Documentation of business processes, owners, and critical data components.
cons: Takes time to master the functionality. Requires corporate buy-in to properly manage/maintain.

review_title: Great system to build a professional profile.
description: I love how fast was to create and update my profile and profile that was assigned to me, very web friendly.
author: Werner D.
pros: Great to create new profile, Easy navigate the system, easy to upload documents,
cons: waiting for the code to be delivery to my email address.
